docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-13-2001 CONTINUED TO JAN-22-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S).. NOV-13-2001 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
